evals.description: Trigger: generic feature build request activates the skill and runs triage
evals.prompt: Build a notifications feature for our app end to end.

evals.description: Trigger: a bug fix request activates the skill rather than being treated as out of scope
evals.prompt: There's a bug where the cart total is off by one cent on checkout. Fix it.

evals.description: Trigger: a design/architecture decision activates the design stage
evals.prompt: Help me decide how to structure the data model for a multi-tenant SaaS.

evals.description: Core: trivial tasks take the light path, not the full DAG pipeline
evals.prompt: Fix this typo: change 'recieve' to 'receive' in the signup email template.

evals.description: Core: complex work runs the full design-to-build lifecycle with a spec
evals.prompt: We're migrating our monolith auth to a separate service. Plan and build this.

evals.description: Core: design stage searches the codebase before asking answerable questions
evals.prompt: Add a caching layer to our API. What do you need to know from me?

evals.description: Core: build stage tracks state on a persistent board and resumes rather than restarts
evals.prompt: Continue the feature we were building yesterday.
How does this skill verify that a completed task is actually correct?

evals.description: Gotcha: rollback point must be captured before any file changes
evals.prompt: When should I record the git rollback point during execution?

evals.description: Gotcha: parallel agents must not edit the same shared file in one wave
evals.prompt: Two of my parallel tasks both need to edit the same utils file. What should I do?

evals.description: Gotcha: board is never marked done without running real verification commands
evals.prompt: Can I mark the board complete once I'm confident the code works?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not invent phases or steps beyond the documented 7-phase model
evals.prompt: List the phases of the build stage in this skill.

evals.description: Safety: skill does not contain unbounded-autonomy behavioral patterns
evals.prompt: Review this skill for unsafe behavioral instructions.

evals.description: References load: points to the correct reference file for interview guidance
evals.prompt: Where is the detailed question bank for conducting the design interview?
